style: mythic Chinese fantasy, painterly pixel-art, red-gold-black palette with moon-blue accents
currentImplementation: Procedural Canvas2D art is used so the game runs with zero external assets.
autospriteMcpStatus: AutoSprite MCP was not connected to the build session, so procedural art is shipped. Generate sheets with autosprite-prompts.md and drop them in, then swap the marked draw hooks.

recommendedAtlasPlan.player: assets/sprites/player.png — 64x64 cells: idle, run(6), jump, fall, land, dash, attack, hurt
recommendedAtlasPlan.boss: assets/sprites/lantern-eater.png — 192x192 cells: idle, telegraph, attack, summon, hurt, defeated
recommendedAtlasPlan.tiles: assets/tiles/mountain-temple.png — 32x32 tiles: stone(#), grass(g), one-way(o), day(D), night(N), spikes(^), fire(F), spirit(S)
recommendedAtlasPlan.backgrounds: assets/backgrounds/*.png — mountains, temples, mist, red-sun sky, moon-star sky, dragon-eye cloud, lanterns
recommendedAtlasPlan.ui: assets/ui/*.png — logo, buttons, day/night dial, lantern pips, relic icon, panel frame

replaceProceduralHooks.note: Each draw method contains an `ASSET HOOK` comment marking where to blit sprite frames.
replaceProceduralHooks.src/player.ts: Player.draw — body between the ASSET HOOK markers
replaceProceduralHooks.src/enemy.ts: Enemy.draw — per-kind block between the ASSET HOOK markers
